title: Go To Parent Wallet (Check If They Have Enough For Network Fees)

actions.value:
Can you check if the parent wallet has enough to cover the network fee?

 

To check your parent wallet follow these steps. 

  1. Tap assets button down at the bottom of the app.
  2. Tap into your Tether wallet.
  3. Tap the three dots on the right hand upper side.
  4. Tap go to parent wallet.

  5. What is your balance? 

     

    *Depending on the network you might need anywhere between $1-$10 or more to cover the network cost. Network fees are not paid to Edge Wallet but are paid to the network operators.

raw_title: Go To Parent Wallet (Check If They Have Enough For Network Fees)
